_comment: Self-contained GitHub daemon profile. Select with `CodeReviewDaemon --review achieveai`. Reviews achieveai/LmDotnetTools through the achieveai/AchieveAiReviews cross-repo store (tool-assisted, sub-agents). Two-model split: the dispatcher/state orchestrator loop runs ReviewModelId (gpt-5.6-luna); the code-reviewer:* review sub-agents run SubAgentModelId (gpt-5.6-sol). POSTING: this profile sets EnableCommentPosting:true below, so it POSTS LIVE — it is the crd-daemon-revobot REPLACEMENT and shares port 5080 + the review-pool, so do NOT run it alongside the deployed daemon. For a collect-only dry run, set EnableCommentPosting:false (or remove it — omitted ⇒ false ⇒ nothing is posted). Machine-specific absolute paths below; this is a fresh instance (its own .run DB) — point DatabasePath at crd-daemon-revobot/review-opus.db to continue that daemon's history.

Github._comment: GitHub CLI (gh) first-party OAuth App id + secret (public, safe to embed — same convention as LmStreaming.Sample). Required so SandboxSessionRegistry attaches the github-auth egress rule for the sandbox; the auth-webhook then injects the EXISTING stored token (crd-oauth-tokens/github.json, scopes repo/read:org/workflow/gist) for the review agent's api.github.com calls (code-reviewer:post-pr-review).
